strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
3x2 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | 24min

hypertrophy.reasoning: Horizontal pressing and running dominate today; build antagonists and weak points to prevent imbalances.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 12 KB Swings, 9 Box Jumps, 6 DB Push Press, 300m Run. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
